---
title: 'Local Hotels'
date: '2012-02-08T23:06:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2882830987520204901'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/local-hotels.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Navigate'
  - 'Discover'
---

<br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">There are many&nbsp;<strong><a data-mce-href="http://maps.google.com/maps?q=hotels&amp;sll=32.984188,-97.487675&amp;sspn=0.037505,0.00706&amp;near=14355+Morris+Dido+Road,+Newark,+TX+76071+(Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries)&amp;geocode=CZ-lNhWEugqrFXxM9wEdxXQw-iFzeK4cHip3AQ&amp;dq=Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries,+loc:+Newark,+TX&amp;t=h&amp;z=11&amp;vpsrc=0" href="http://maps.google.com/maps?q=hotels&amp;sll=32.984188,-97.487675&amp;sspn=0.037505,0.00706&amp;near=14355+Morris+Dido+Road,+Newark,+TX+76071+(Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries)&amp;geocode=CZ-lNhWEugqrFXxM9wEdxXQw-iFzeK4cHip3AQ&amp;dq=Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries,+loc:+Newark,+TX&amp;t=h&amp;z=11&amp;vpsrc=0" target="_blank" title="Hotels near DFW">hotels in the DFW area</a></strong>. DFW is among the largest airports in the country and a major hub for connecting flights. For a better idea of the hotels in the area you are looking for, please check out this map.</div><div style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;"><br /><iframe frameborder="0" height="350" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="http://maps.google.com/maps?q=hotels&amp;sll=32.984188,-97.487675&amp;sspn=0.037505,0.00706&amp;near=14355+Morris+Dido+Road,+Newark,+TX+76071+(Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries)&amp;geocode=CZ-lNhWEugqrFXxM9wEdxXQw-iFzeK4cHip3AQ&amp;dq=Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries,+loc:+Newark,+TX&amp;t=h&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;hq=hotels&amp;hnear=&amp;ll=32.944192,-97.423218&amp;spn=0.319742,0.323377&amp;output=embed" width="425"></iframe><br /><small><a href="http://maps.google.com/maps?q=hotels&amp;sll=32.984188,-97.487675&amp;sspn=0.037505,0.00706&amp;near=14355+Morris+Dido+Road,+Newark,+TX+76071+(Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries)&amp;geocode=CZ-lNhWEugqrFXxM9wEdxXQw-iFzeK4cHip3AQ&amp;dq=Kenneth+Copeland+Ministries,+loc:+Newark,+TX&amp;t=h&amp;ie=UTF8&amp;hq=hotels&amp;hnear=&amp;ll=32.944192,-97.423218&amp;spn=0.319742,0.323377&amp;source=embed" style="color: blue; text-align: left;">View Larger Map</a></small><br /><br /><br /><br /></div>
